targets.expr:
ceph_pool_max_avail{ job="ceph-cluster"} *
  on(pool_id) group_left(name) ceph_pool_metadata{ job="ceph-cluster"}

ceph_pool_percent_used{ job="ceph-cluster"} *
  on(pool_id) group_left(name) ceph_pool_metadata{ job="ceph-cluster"}
ceph_pool_stored{ job="ceph-cluster"} * on(pool_id) group_left ceph_pool_metadata{ job="ceph-cluster"}
